title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.309 - Assignment of credit, procedure
text:
135.309.  Assignment of credit, procedure. — The wood energy producer may elect to assign to a third party the approved tax credit.  Certification of assignment and other appropriate forms must be filed with the Missouri department of revenue.
(L. 1985 H.B. 831 § 4, A.L. 1996 H.B. 1237) 
Effective 1-01-97
